name: everything-claude-unity
description: The ultimate Claude Code toolkit for Unity game development. Production-ready agents, commands, skills, and safety hooks for building mobile games with natural language.
highlights: 15 specialized agents — coder, verifier, prototyper, optimizer, shader-dev, scene-builder, and more
Full workflow pipeline: clarify → plan → execute → verify with automated fix loops
Unity MCP integration for scene building, profiling, testing, and builds
22 safety hooks with profile-gated activation (minimal / standard / strict)
40 knowledge skills covering Unity systems, gameplay patterns, genres, and third-party packages
10 C# templates for MVS architecture (Model, View, System, LifetimeScope, Message)
8 validation scripts for meta integrity, code quality, serialization, and architecture
